MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Defendants Motion Requesting Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion Requesting Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to compel further responses to Defendant's First Sets of Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Requests for Production, and for sanctions, is granted as follows: Within 30 days of service of notice of entry of this order, Plaintiff shall: (A) serve supplemental responses to (1) Special Interrogatories 5, 8 and 11, and to Form Interrogatories 202.1(d), 203.1(a), 203.1(e), 207.2(c) and 203.1(j), providing any additional information available to plaintiff regarding the listed individuals' phone numbers and addresses and/or whether those individuals are employees of defendant whose contact information should be known to defendant, or state that plaintiff has no additional information; (2) Form Interrogatory 210.2, providing the total amount of income, benefits, or earning capacity plaintiff has lost to date and how the amount was calculated; (3) Form Interrogatory 210.5, providing the cost of Plaintiff's dental insurance; and (4) Form Interrogatory 212.4(c), providing dates of services (Plaintiff's other responses challenged by Defendant are sufficient); (B) produce documents in compliance with Plaintiff's responses, except no relevant responsive documents shall be withheld based on a claim of privilege, as all objections were previously waived; and (C) pay Defendant sanctions in the amount of $1,631.50 (6.5 hours at counsel's internal rate of $251/hour).

Court to sign proposed order submitted by prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR DEFENDANTS MOTION REQUESTING SANCTIONS.
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Off Calendar
